name: sandbox-dind
description: A confined agent box with inner Docker (DIND): the sandbox flavor plus a nested Docker daemon. Opt into the rs-sandbox box harness to spin isolated sub-boxes.
greeting:
Sandbox-dind — a confined agent box with inner Docker.

This is the sandbox flavor plus a nested Docker daemon (DIND): run `claude` here
(bypassPermissions, locked egress) and use the inner `docker` for builds, tests,
or running untrusted images.

If this project was created with the box harness (--with-boxes), manage isolated
sub-boxes with the `rs-sandbox` CLI:
  rs-sandbox            show usage
  rs-sandbox create     spin a new box (--browser for a Playwright box)
  rs-sandbox list       list boxes and their state
  rs-sandbox discard    tear a box down
